directive.title: FS-RESP-003: Mobile Chart Responsiveness — Remaining 9 Dashboard Pages

auditor.summary: The build fails to meet critical acceptance criteria. Only 7 of 9 required page files were generated, the required Playwright test file was not created, and the ChartWrapper component was incorrectly created as new instead of being imported from the existing codebase. The generated pages that do exist correctly implement the ChartWrapper migration pattern with proper imports, tick font sizes, tooltip dimensions, and legend styling. However, the missing files and test suite make this build incomplete and unverifiable. The build also introduces a TypeScript `any` type violation in the PieChart label renderer.

top_issues.description: The Playwright test file required by the build specification was not generated. The spec explicitly requires a single test suite covering all 14 dashboard pages.
Required page file was not generated. The build spec lists 9 files to modify, but only 7 were generated. Missing: app/(dashboard)/purchase-orders/page.tsx
Required page file was not generated. The build spec lists 9 files to modify, but only 7 were generated. Missing: app/(dashboard)/cost-avoidance/page.tsx
